allow: Bash(# Gradio 5 uses different API structure - let''s check config curl -s http://localhost:7860/config | python3 -c "" import json, sys data = json.load\(sys.stdin\) # Find components for comp in data.get\(''components'', []\): ctype = comp.get\(''type'', ''''\) if ctype in \(''dropdown'', ''slider'', ''button'', ''html'', ''markdown''\): print\(f\\"" id={comp[''id'']} type={ctype} label={comp.get\(''props'',{}\).get\(''label'',''''\)}\\""\) # Find API endpoints for dep in data.get\(''dependencies'', []\): print\(f\\"" api: fn_index={dep.get\(''id''\)} targets={dep.get\(''targets''\)}\\""\) "" 2>&1)
